📊 Send to Google Sheets

Paste your Google Apps Script Web App URL to automatically log this lead.

No URL yet? See setup guide below ↓

How to set up Google Sheets →
  1. Open Google Sheets → Extensions → Apps Script
  2. Delete all existing code, paste the script (button below)
  3. Click Deploy → New deployment → Web app
  4. Set "Who has access" to Anyone → Deploy
  5. Copy the Web App URL and paste above
